title: View Workload Telemetry
content:
# View Workload Telemetry

You can see the telemetry of a workload for any Application in the Kelvin UI.

Click on **Applications**, select the Application card, then navigate to the Workload tab to view the list of workloads for that Application.

Then click on a Workload name.

Then click on the **Telemetry** tab.

Here you can view all the telemetry information.

* Memory Usage, Requests and Limits
* CPU Usage, Requests and Limits
* Network Usage, Received and Transmitted
* Storage IO
* IOPS and Throughput
summary: You can see the telemetry of a workload for any Application in the Kelvin UI. Click on Applications, select the Application card, then navigate to the Workload tab to view the list of workloads for that Application.
